name: Arkansas Pig Pickin Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 small can mandarin oranges (do not drain!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for the icing until the mandarin oranges are thoroughly mashed.
2. Pour the icing mixture into greased, floured pans.
3. Preheat the oven to 325°F and bake until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Allow the cake to cool completely (refrigerating is recommended).
4. In a separate bowl, partially drain the crushed pineapple and stir in the dry vanilla pudding mix until well blended.
5. Fold in the Cool Whip until incorporated into the batter.
6. Spread the icing mixture over the cooled cake.
7. Top with chopped pecans (optional), coconut, etc.
8. Store the cake in the refrigerator. Slices can be frozen individually for packing in lunches. The cake is perfect by the time lunch arrives.
Note: This recipe is moist, easy, and delicious! Enjoy!
